name: report-bug
description: Generate a bug report object for the bug explanation.

title.description: Assign a name to the bug. The name should be short and to the point.

description.description: Provide a brief but detailed description of the bug based in the user's input.

priority.description: Assign a priority to the bug. If the user provided a priority level in the prompt, use the priority level. Otherwise, assign a priority level based on the importance of the bug.
